10528261.title: Managing Asia
10528261.description: A look at what it takes to transform a business to become greener and ensure a more sustainable future. Christine Tan talks to CEOs from four companies in the region, YTL PowerSeraya, TAL Apparel, Banpu Public Company and Alliance Global.

10659721.title: Managing Asia
10659721.description: Schneider Electric recently topped a poll as the world's most sustainable corporate. CEO, Jean-Pascal Tricoire talks exclusively to Christine Tan on why he started the company's green path 15 years ago.
